notes.coverage: All 4 sites are JavaScript SPAs or WAF-protected. CDX coverage varies — sparse for arlis.am, moderate for lex.uz.
notes.languages: Titles ingested as-is in native language. No transliteration applied.
notes.kyrgyzstan: cbd.minjust.gov.kg returns 403 on direct access — CDX-only.
